TSLA: Rising fuel costs drive continued spike in EV searches across new and used markets. Rising fuel costs, exacerbated by the Iran conflict, are significantly boosting consumer interest in electric vehicles (EVs) across both new and used markets. Cars.com reported a 25% increase in combined EV searches, with Tesla leading used EV inquiries and models like the Volkswagen ID. Buzz and Chevrolet Equinox EV prominent in new EV searches. This trend highlights a potential market shift and an opportunity for dealers with strong EV inventory.

Tesla: Full Self-Driving Approval in Netherlands Should Boost Deliveries. Dutch regulators have approved Tesla's full self-driving (FSD) supervised software for use, with the next step being EU-wide approval, expected later this year. This approval is anticipated to boost Tesla's European sales in the second half of 2026, offsetting projected declines in US deliveries due to the expiration of tax credits. Morningstar maintains its $400 fair value estimate for Tesla, considering the stock fairly valued.

'What Happened To All The Tesla Killers?' Elon Musk Taunts Rivals As Q1 US Deliveries Beat Every Other EV Maker Combined. Elon Musk has taunted rivals and critics, questioning the "Tesla killer" narrative after the company's strong Q1 US EV delivery performance. Tesla sold more vehicles in Q1 than all other EV makers combined, capturing over 54% of the market share, despite an overall decline in US EV sales. The Model Y continues to be a dominant force, contributing significantly to Tesla's sales volume, while other automakers reported steep declines.

Tesla’s Ex-President Boosted Sales With a Trick Learned From Domino’s Pizza. Tesla's former president, Jon McNeill, implemented a strategy learned from Domino's Pizza to significantly boost online car sales. Challenged by Elon Musk to increase digital sales by 2,000 percent, McNeill realized that Tesla's complex ordering process, with 64 clicks, caused decision fatigue. By simplifying the car configurations to offer only 2-3 preconfigured models and reducing customization, he cut the clicks needed to purchase, making the process much more streamlined and user-friendly, similar to Domino's 10-click ordering system.

Wall Street Struggles For Direction, Tesla Flirts With Record Highs, Bitcoin Tumbles Below $95,000: What's Driving Markets Tuesday?. The U.S. stock market showed mixed signals on Tuesday with limited direction as investors awaited crucial November inflation data. Tesla and Alphabet saw significant gains, while the broader tech and cryptocurrency markets experienced declines, with Bitcoin falling below $95,000. Boeing's stock rose on production news, while Oracle and several other companies reacted to earnings reports.
TGT: Allen Wealth Management LLC Makes New Investment in Kimberly-Clark Corporation $KMB. Allen Wealth Management LLC has made a new investment in Kimberly-Clark Corporation (NYSE: KMB), purchasing over 11,000 shares valued at approximately $1.135 million, now representing 0.7% of its portfolio. Kimberly-Clark recently increased its quarterly dividend to $1.28 per share, offering a 5.3% annual yield, and reported Q4 EPS of $1.86, beating estimates. Analysts currently rate the stock as a "Hold" with an average price target of $115.

e.l.f. Beauty (NYSE:ELF) Given Average Recommendation of "Moderate Buy" by Analysts. e.l.f. Beauty (NYSE:ELF) has received a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from 18 analysts, with an average one-year price target of $111. The company reported strong quarterly earnings, beating estimates with $1.24 EPS and $489.5 million in revenue, and provided optimistic FY2026 guidance. However, CEO Tarang Amin recently sold a significant portion of his direct ownership in the company.

SN top 10: BJ’s Wholesale Club makes move to keep up with competitors. BJ’s Wholesale Club has extended its store hours to 10 p.m. Monday through Saturday and 9 p.m. on Sundays, following similar moves by competitors Sam’s Club and Costco. This change aims to keep the retailer competitive within the warehouse club sector. The article also lists other top grocery stories from the week, including Target's specialized approach to grocery, Kroger's legal issues, and grocery price drops.

Target Corp. stock underperforms Monday when compared to competitors. Target Corp. (TGT) shares fell 3.29% on Monday, closing at $117.88, despite a positive trading day for the broader market. The S&P 500 Index rose 1.02% and the Dow Jones Industrial Average gained 0.63%. This marked the second consecutive day of losses for Target's stock.

3 Retail Stocks to Watch for a Post-Tax-Day Bump. As Tax Day passes, some retailers may see a boost from consumers spending their refunds. This article highlights three retail stocks – Target (TGT), Deckers Outdoor (DECK), and Best Buy (BBY) – that could experience short-term gains. Target needs a sales win after facing various challenges, Deckers is capitalizing on market share gains with brands like UGG and HOKA, and Best Buy could benefit if refund dollars are used for big-ticket electronics.
SBUX: Baillie Gifford Trims Starbucks Stake in Q4. Baillie Gifford & Co. reduced its stake in Starbucks Corporation by 6.0% in the fourth quarter of 2025, selling 41,355 shares. This move suggests the major institutional investor sees limited near-term upside for Starbucks' stock, despite the company's global expansion. Baillie Gifford now holds 645,865 shares, valued at $54.4 million, representing 0.06% of Starbucks' outstanding stock.
DIS: The Walt Disney Company $DIS Stock Holdings Decreased by Atwater Malick LLC. Atwater Malick LLC reduced its stake in The Walt Disney Company by 28.1% in Q4, selling 10,087 shares and holding 25,858 shares valued at $2.94 million. Despite this, Wall Street sentiments lean positive with 18 analysts rating DIS a Buy and an average price target of $132.19. Disney recently exceeded Q1 earnings estimates, reporting $1.63 EPS on $25.98 billion revenue.

Press Release: The Walt Disney Company Executives to Discuss Fiscal Second Quarter 2026 Financial Results via Webcast. The Walt Disney Company announced that its fiscal second quarter 2026 financial results webcast will be held on Wednesday, May 13, 2026, at 4:30 p.m. EDT/1:30 p.m. PDT. The webcast will feature a discussion of results by Disney's senior management and will include a Q&A session. Investors can access the webcast on the company's Investor Relations website.

Webtoon Is Making New Platform. Webtoon Entertainment Inc. is launching "Canvas," its first international platform to consolidate regional services and enhance creator monetization. The platform will support seven languages and AI-powered translations, aiming to expand audience reach and foster global fan communities. This initiative follows fluctuating stock performance since its 2024 IPO and a slight increase in revenue driven by paid content and IP adaptations, including a partnership with Disney.

The Walt Disney Company Executives To Discuss Fiscal Second Quarter 2026 Financial Results Via Webcast. The Walt Disney Company (NYSE: DIS) announced it will host a live webcast to discuss its fiscal second quarter 2026 financial results. The webcast is scheduled for Wednesday, May 6, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. ET / 5:30 a.m. PT. Results and earnings materials will be released and posted on the company's investor relations website before trading opens on the same day.

Disney reports quarterly results May 6 before market open. The Walt Disney Company (NYSE: DIS) will host a live webcast to discuss its fiscal second quarter 2026 financial results on Wednesday, May 6, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. ET. The company plans to release its earnings results and post related materials on its investor relations website before the market opens on that day. Interested parties can access the webcast and materials at www.disney.com/investors.
NKE: Did NIKE, Inc. Insiders Breach their Fiduciary Duties to Shareholders?. Halper Sadeh LLC, an investor rights law firm, is investigating whether certain officers and directors of NIKE, Inc. (NYSE: NKE) breached their fiduciary duties to shareholders. The firm urges long-term NIKE shareholders to contact them to explore potential legal options, including seeking corporate governance reforms or financial incentives. Their goal is to improve company policies and enhance shareholder value by holding fiduciaries accountable.
